englishDefinitions: An American comedian, actor, and television pioneer known for his innovative and surreal comedy.
persianTranslation: کمدین و چهره تلویزیونی آمریکایی ارنی کوواکس
examples: Ernie Kovacs was known for his creative TV comedy.
The documentary explores the career of Ernie Kovacs.
Older viewers may remember Ernie Kovacs from early television.
